scripts.build: tsc --project src && rimraf dist gen && node -r ../../tools/typescript-compat/register-fallback.cjs --experimental-loader ../../tools/typescript-compat/register-fallback.mjs ../node_modules/.bin/typedoc && tsc ./src/build.ts --module commonjs --target es2020 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --ignoreConfig && node -r ../../tools/typescript-compat/register-fallback.cjs --experimental-loader ../../tools/typescript-compat/register-fallback.mjs ./src/build.js && tsc && rimraf ./src/build.js
